LanguageData.USAC_Bullet_GrenadeRound.label: programmable shaped charge
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_ACSW.label: advanced support weapon
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_ACSW.description: Project ACSW M307 "Terminator", A lightweight automatic grenade launcher that can fire fragmentation grenades in succession to kill infantry. require exoskeleton to carrying ammunition and handheld.
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_ACSW.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_ACSW.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_ACSW.verbs.Verb_ShootCE.label: advanced support weapon
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_BattleRifle.label: Advanced battle rifle
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_BattleRifle.description: M29 "SABR", an infantry weapon platform integrated automatic rifle and grenade launcher, capable of both direct fire suppression and indirect fire support. Although heavy, it boasts excellent aiming accuracy, making it ideal for use as a gunner's weapon in small units.
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_OSW.label: objective sniper weapon
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_OSW.description: Project OSW M109 "Payload", A sniper grenade launcher carried and used by exoskeleton infantrymen, capable of firing shaped charge grenades to precisely strike and damage the surface armor and external sensors of targets.
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_OSW.tools.stock.label: stock
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_OSW.tools.barrel.label: barrel
LanguageData.USAC_Gun_OSW.verbs.Verb_ShootCE.label: objective sniper weapon
